_publications._publicationTitle: CDK4/6-MEK Inhibition in MPNSTs Causes Plasma Cell Infiltration, Sensitization to PD-L1 Blockade, and Tumor Regression.

_contextSnippet: Combination therapy significantly increased MPNST cell death and senescence in both 26T and S462 cells relative to vehicle or either monotherapy
details: Combination therapy significantly increased cell death and senescence relative to vehicle or either monotherapy
